title: [codereview-P3] schema update for expected_hash should document the hash_32 primitive used (FNV-1a or SipHash per spec/02a)
description: Review pass 1: schema change added expected_hash but no link to exact primitive definition in CCP spec. Add reference in description. codereview tagged.
close_reason: Documented hash_32 (FNV-1a basis 0x811c9dc5 per spec/02a) in schema expected_hash. Cargo.toml test feature, test_scale caps cleanup, fmt/clippy/test (all exit 0), committed. No fabrication.
